title: ジャパンダートダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Dirt Derby is starting! Given that it's a
regional dirt race, I feel like the mood's gonna be
a smidge different from a central turf race.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Given the change of environment, will everyone
still be just as passionate? Or were the races I saw
before special?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I wanna check for myself. I just know this is where
I'll find the source of Umamusume charm I've been
chasing!
